predial.descripcion_estructural: Ninguna variante validó (declared='tasa_unica'). Razones: tarifa_millar: List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0; progresivo: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0; tasa_unica: List should have at most 1 item after validation, not 7; cuota_fija_simple: List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0; cuota_fija_escalonada: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0; mixto: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0
